Triggering the high-rise office building and '2-person electronics factory' physical destruction probe. This enterprise, named 'Juling Technology,' was slapped with the advanced tag of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' in official classification, and its business license also glaringly lists 'communication equipment, electronic equipment, instrumentation manufacturing.' The most fatal blow comes from its spatial coordinates: 'Room 905, Block G, No. 33 Dongqi Road, Dongshan Sub-district.' 'Block G 905' implies this is merely an ordinary commercial office on the 9th floor. The logical deduction instantly turns into a demotion strike: inside a 9th-floor single office room, a boss plus 1 employee, holding over two million RMB, claim to have built a manufacturing assembly line for 'communication equipment and instrumentation'? This not only violates common sense regarding floor load-bearing and environmental assessments of high-rise buildings but is also typical 'license padding.' The probe mercilessly deleted all delusional rhetoric about 'manufacturing,' extracting its true core actions from the beginning and end of its license: 'software development, technical consulting; electronic equipment sales.' The truth is extremely bare-bones: this is a 100% pure 2-Employee High-Rise Software & Trading Shell. The boss rented an office on the 9th floor, usually taking on freelance software outsourcing jobs, or acting as an agent flipping electronic instruments and communication equipment online to earn the price difference. The official 'Major Electronic Device Manufacturer' tag has been subjected to the most thorough physical eradication by the system.
